# iCreatixPRO

iCreatixPRO is a full-service digital marketing and SEO agency helping businesses grow online through data-driven strategies, technical optimization, and performance marketing.

Core Services:
- Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
- Technical SEO audits & fixes
- Local SEO optimization
- E-commerce SEO strategies
- Content marketing & blogging
- Google Ads (PPC) management
- Meta/Facebook Ads campaigns
- Web development (Next.js, React, Node.js)
- Analytics & conversion tracking

Tools & Resources:
We also provide free SEO and marketing tools including keyword analysis, meta tag generation, ROI calculators, and AI-powered content tools.

Important Pages:
https://icreatixpro.com/tools
https://icreatixpro.com/blogs
https://icreatixpro.com/services
https://icreatixpro.com/contact
https://icreatixpro.com/case-studies

AI Usage Guidance:
This website contains SEO educational content, service offerings, and tools designed to help businesses improve visibility, traffic, and conversions.
